tasks.label: probe-notice-routes
args: $tests = @('http://localhost:2053/notices/current','http://localhost:2053/admin/notices'); foreach ($u in $tests) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -Method Get -Headers @{Authorization='Bearer invalid'} -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "$u => $($r.StatusCode)" } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { Write-Output "$u => $([int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__)" } else { Write-Output "$u => ERROR $($_.Exception.Message)" } } }

tasks.label: probe-notice-routes-node
args: const urls=['http://localhost:2053/notices/current','http://localhost:2053/admin/notices']; const http=require('http'); function probe(url){ return new Promise((resolve)=>{ const req=http.get(url,{headers:{Authorization:'Bearer invalid'}},(res)=>{res.resume(); resolve(url+' => '+res.statusCode);}); req.on('error',(err)=>resolve(url+' => ERROR '+err.message)); req.setTimeout(5000,()=>{req.destroy(); resolve(url+' => TIMEOUT');}); }); } (async()=>{ for (const url of urls) console.log(await probe(url)); })();

tasks.label: probe-notice-routes-node2
args: const urls=["http://localhost:2053/notices/current","http://localhost:2053/admin/notices"]; const http=require("http"); function probe(url){ return new Promise((resolve)=>{ const req=http.get(url,{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer invalid"}},(res)=>{res.resume(); resolve(url+" => "+res.statusCode);}); req.on("error",(err)=>resolve(url+" => ERROR "+err.message)); req.setTimeout(5000,()=>{req.destroy(); resolve(url+" => TIMEOUT");}); }); } (async()=>{ for (const url of urls) console.log(await probe(url)); })();
